author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Gokigen You, Ikkyoku Ikaga?' Gets TV Anime Adaptation
Video game developer Yostar Co, LTD. announced a television anime adaptation of Tsukasa Unohana's Gokigen You, Ikkyoku Ikaga? (Good Day to You, How About a Game?) manga on Friday, revealing the main staff and a celebratory illustration (pictured) by Unohana. Staff Director: Kaori (5-toubun no Hanayome ∬, Hoshikuzu Telepath) Series Composition: Kazuyuki Fudeyasu (Shangri-La Frontier) Character Design: Mai Ootsuka (Non Non Biyori) Studio: Felix Film Unohana (Anima Yell!) began serializing the...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Jirai nan desu ka? Chihara-san' Reveals Additional Cast, Staff, Winter 2027 Debut
The official website for the television anime adaptation of Ryon's Jirai nan desu ka? Chihara-san (Are You a Jirai Girl, Chihara-san?) manga revealed additional cast and staff on Thursday. The anime series, originally scheduled to air in 2026, is now planned to broadcast nationwide on 28 MBS and TBS-affiliated stations under the Super Animeism Turbo programming block at 12:26 a.m. for a January 2027 premiere. Cast Chinatsu Iwakura: Maaya Uchida (Chuunibyou demo Koi ga Shitai!) Hibiya: Tomok...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Gacha wo Mawashite Nakama wo Fuyasu: Saikyou no Bishoujo Gundan wo Tsukuriagero' Reveals Main Cast, Production Staff, Winter 2027 Debut
Production company Bushiroad opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Chinkururi and Nanashina's Gacha wo Mawashite Nakama wo Fuyasu: Saikyou no Bishoujo Gundan wo Tsukuriagero (Gacha Girls Corps) light novel on Thursday, revealing the main cast, production staff, and a teaser visual (pictured). The anime series will premiere in January 2027. Cast Heihachi Okura: Daisuke Sakaguchi (One Piece) Norl: Miyu Tomita (Kaguya-sama wa Kokurasetai) Estelle: Iori Noguchi (=LOVE)...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
J.C.Staff Produces 'Nabe ni Tama wo Ukenagara' TV Anime Adaptation for 2027
Production company Kadokawa announced a television anime adaptation of Juntarou Aoki and Shin Moriyama's Nabe ni Tama wo Ukenagara (Getting Shots on Frying Pan) manga on Thursday, revealing a teaser visual (pictured right). Produced by J.C.Staff, the anime is scheduled to air in 2027. Aoki began serializing the slice of life manga, with illustrations by Moriyama, on Comic Newtype website in May 2021. Kadokawa published the fifth volume in October 2024. A spin-off series titled Nabe ni Tama...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
Manga 'Sudachi no Maoujou' Gets TV Anime Adaptation For Winter 2027
An official website opened for a television adaptation of Makoto Morishita's Sudachi no Maoujou (The Fledgling Demon Lord's Starter Shop) manga on Thursday, revealing the main cast, production staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and promotional video. The anime is scheduled to premiere in January 2027. Voice actors Reiji Kawashima (Yozakura-san Chi no Daisakusen) and Rumi Ookubo (Mayonaka Heart Tune) are starring in the anime as Murabito and Mao, respectively. Staff Director: Jun Taira...

text:
'Zombie no Afureta Sekai de Ore dake ga Osowarenai' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for Winter 2027
Production company Frontier Works opened an official website for a television anime adaptation of Rokuro Uraji's Zombie no Afureta Sekai de Ore dake ga Osowarenai (In a World Full of Zombies I'm the Only One Who Doesn't Get Attacked) light novel on Thursday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured) and teaser promotional video. The anime series, originally scheduled to air in 2026, is now planned to broadcast on AT-X for a January 2027 premiere. Voice actors Wata...

author: MyAnimeList News
text:
'Cyborg 009: Nemesis' Reveals Additional Staff, Main Promo, Ending Theme
The official website of the Cyborg 009: Nemesis anime series revealed additional staff, a key visual (pictured), ending theme, and the main promo on Thursday. The anime adapting Shoutarou Ishinomori's action sci-fi manga will begin streaming on July 19. Staff Color Design: Mika Iwami (Isekai Yururi Kikou) Art Setting: Hisashi Kubo Director of Photography: Kengo Ishii Editing: Hiroshi Onoguchi Music: Kenji Katou (Musekinin Galaxy☆Tylor) Music Producer: Tomoatsu Kikuchi Music Production: Righ...
